sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21474" key="galach/eis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γαλαξ-ήεις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εσσα</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εν</itype>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg., <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῥέεθρα</foreign> <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l.</abbr> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2045.tlg001.perseus-grc1:22:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">22.18</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
